cards.name: Breakout
cards.note: Hold near highs before treating it as a valid breakout.

cards.name: Base
cards.note: Stay patient until volume expansion confirms the move.

cards.name: Breaklow Reclaim
cards.note: Only counts after price closes back above the prior low.

cards.name: Weak Rebound
cards.note: Treat as a bounce until key levels are recovered.
